financial_answer.answer: The company is paid its allowable incurred costs plus a profit which can be fixed or variable depending on the contract’s fee arrangement up to predetermined funding levels determined by the customer.

citations.row: Sales included in Other contract types represent cost plus and time and material type contracts.
